{{Infobox location
| name = Rosegold
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Rosegold is an ancient continent that has been largely forgotten by the current inhabitants of [[Cradle]]. According to local legends, it was once home to a mythical buried city that holds all the secrets of the [[sacred arts]]. It is said that anyone who discovers this city and explores its streets will acquire immense power, bypass all advancement obstacles, and gain the celestial wisdom necessary for ascension. In past times, the continent was a frequent subject of discussion, and attempting to refine one's [[Path]] or find an easy way to advance was referred to as "Seeking [[Arelia]]." The continent is characterized by the color blue, and it was once linked to the continent of [[Iceflower]]. Additionally, Rosegold contains a museum protected by a [[Herald]] from [[House Shen]], which is rumored to house an artifact of the [[Abidan]].}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Rosegold]] is a location that can be reached from the current area.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rosegold]] is a destination reachable via a [[labyrinth]] branch.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rosegold]] is a continent not facing invasion.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Rosegold]] contains a museum.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Monarch]] of [[House Shen]] was securing prizes in [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Rosegold]] is a continent.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Rosegold]] is a populated continent.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
